description: To succeed and thrive; flourishing that spreads abundance. 'Thuo' names the thriving state—when conditions support full expression of potential.
sound_symbolism: The word opens with 'thu', where the mindful 'th' brings awareness to thriving—prosperity that is conscious, not accidental. The deep 'u' grounds this flourishing in substance. The final 'o' rounds into fullness, abundance completing itself. Speaking 'thuo' feels like awareness opening into wealth of experience, mindful thriving.
grammatical_notes: Functions as verb: 'mia thuo' (I prosper). The outcome of 'sunoe' (regenerate) and 'pelu' (growth). Related to 'towe' (well) as active thriving to good state.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Shared prosperity—flourishing that includes all, not wealth hoarded by few.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: True prosperity—thriving measured in wellbeing, not accumulation.
